title: Arduino Workshop: Build Your First Robot
description: Hands-on workshop where you'll build and program a line-following robot using Arduino Uno. All components provided.

title: Embedded C Masterclass
description: Deep dive into embedded C programming — from register manipulation to interrupt handling on ATmega328.

title: HackCircuit 2026 — 24hr Hackathon
description: Our flagship hackathon! Build hardware+software solutions for real-world problems. Prizes worth ₹50,000.

title: IoT & ESP32: Smart Campus Project
description: Learn to build IoT solutions using ESP32 — connect sensors, push data to cloud, and create dashboards.

title: PCB Design with KiCad
description: Design professional PCBs from scratch — schematic capture, layout, and ordering from manufacturers.

title: Guest Talk: Industry Trends in Embedded Systems
description: Industry expert shares insights on RISC-V, edge AI, and the future of embedded development.
